structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling-Only VAV Zone State to Active Airflow Setpoint Mapping
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Control Logic for Cooling-Only VAV Zone
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is cooling, map cooling-loop output to active airflow setpoint from minimum to cooling maximum. If supply air temperature is greater than room temperature, cap setpoint at minimum.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Map cooling-loop output to active airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. If supply air temperature from air handler is greater than room temperature, set active airflow setpoint no higher than minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. a. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. a. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.
evidence_text: When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. a. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling-Only VAV Zone Deadband Active Airflow Setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Control Logic for Cooling-Only VAV Zone
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is deadband, set active airflow setpoint to minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set active airflow setpoint to minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is deadband, the active airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is deadband, the active airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.
evidence_text: When the Zone State is deadband, the active airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling-Only VAV Zone Heating Active Airflow Setpoint Mapping
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Control Logic for Cooling-Only VAV Zone
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is heating, map heating-loop output to active airflow setpoint from minimum to heating maximum. If supply air temperature is less than 3°C above room temperature, cap setpoint at minimum.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Map heating-loop output to active airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to heating maximum endpoint. If supply air temperature from air handler is less than 3°C (5°F) above room temperature, set active airflow setpoint no higher than minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is heating, the Heating Loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the heating maximum endpoint. a. If supply air temperature from the air handler is less than 3°C (5°F) above the room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: When the Zone State is heating, the Heating Loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the heating maximum endpoint. a. If supply air temperature from the air handler is less than 3°C (5°F) above the room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.
evidence_text: When the Zone State is heating, the Heating Loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the heating maximum endpoint. a. If supply air temperature from the air handler is less than 3°C (5°F) above the room temperature, the active airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling-Only VAV Damper Modulation to Maintain Active Airflow Setpoint
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Control Logic for Cooling-Only VAV Zone
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Modulate VAV damper to maintain measured airflow at active setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Always active when zone is in operation
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate VAV damper by a control loop to maintain measured airflow at active setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The VAV damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured airflow at the active setpoint.

evidence_quote: The VAV damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured airflow at the active setpoint.
evidence_text: The VAV damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured airflow at the active setpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm (70% of Setpoint for 10 Minutes)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate Level 4 alarm if measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
evidence_text: If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm (50% of Setpoint for 10 Minutes)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate Level 3 alarm if measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.
evidence_text: If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm Suppression for Zero Importance Multiplier Zones
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Suppress low airflow alarms for zones with importance multiplier of 0 for static pressure reset T&R loop.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Suppress low airflow alarms for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If a zone has an importance multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote: If a zone has an importance multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
evidence_text: If a zone has an importance multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Sensor Calibration Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate Level 3 alarm if fan is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of cooling maximum or 50 cfm for 30 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan serving zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Fan OFF and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
evidence_text: If the fan serving the zone is OFF and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Damper Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate Level 4 alarm if damper position is 0% and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of cooling maximum or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while fan is proven on.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Damper position = 0% and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes while fan is proven on
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Damper position = 0% and airflow sensor reading > max(10% of Vcool-max, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes while fan is proven on
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven on, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven on, generate a Level 4 alarm.
evidence_text: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the zone is proven on, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides for Cooling-Only VAV Box
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, force damper full closed/open, and reset request-hours accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Provide software switches interlocked to system-level point to: a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, e. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Verify that software switches are provided and functional.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system-level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, and e. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system-level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, and e. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).
evidence_text: Provide software switches that interlock to a system-level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force damper full closed/open, and e. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Recommendation to Use Reheat Box When Minimum Ventilation Rate Exceeds 25% of Cooling Maximum or DCV is Used
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If minimum ventilation rate is more than 25% of cooling maximum, or DCV is used, a reheat box is recommended to avoid overcooling.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the minimum ventilation rate is more than 25% or so of the cooling maximum, or DCV is used, a reheat box is recommended to avoid overcooling.

evidence_quote: If the minimum ventilation rate is more than 25% or so of the cooling maximum, or DCV is used, a reheat box is recommended to avoid overcooling.
evidence_text: If the minimum ventilation rate is more than 25% or so of the cooling maximum, or DCV is used, a reheat box is recommended to avoid overcooling.

structured_payload_candidate.title: DCV Not Provided for Cooling-Only Boxes Due to Overcooling Risk
structured_payload_candidate.summary: DCV logic is not provided for cooling-only boxes because it results in periods of overcooling due to CO2 levels rising faster than cooling load.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: DCV logic is not provided for cooling-only boxes, because doing so results in periods of overcooling, as the CO2 levels due to occupants rises much faster than the cooling load due to occupants because of thermal mass.

evidence_quote: DCV logic is not provided for cooling-only boxes, because doing so results in periods of overcooling, as the CO2 levels due to occupants rises much faster than the cooling load due to occupants because of thermal mass.
evidence_text: DCV logic is not provided for cooling-only boxes, because doing so results in periods of overcooling, as the CO2 levels due to occupants rises much faster than the cooling load due to occupants because of thermal mass.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Capability Condition for Cooling-Only Terminal Units
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Cooling-only terminal units can provide heating only when AHU supply air temperature is more than 3°C (5°F) above room temperature.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Cooling-only terminal units can provide heating only when the AHU supply air temperature is more than 3°C (5°F) above the room temperature.

evidence_quote: Cooling-only terminal units can provide heating only when the AHU supply air temperature is more than 3°C (5°F) above the room temperature.
evidence_text: Cooling-only terminal units can provide heating only when the AHU supply air temperature is more than 3°C (5°F) above the room temperature.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Active Endpoints as Function of Zone Group Mode for Cooling-Only VAV
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Active Endpoints as Function of Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Active endpoints vary by Zone Group mode as per Table 5.5.4: Occupied uses Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; Cooldown and Setup use Vcool-max; Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied use 0 for cooling and minimum, with heating maximum set to Vcool-max for Warmup and Setback.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set active endpoints according to Table 5.5.4.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Table 5.5.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode: Occupied: Cooling maximum Vcool-max, Minimum Vmin*, Heating maximum Vheat-max; Cooldown: Cooling maximum Vcool-max, Minimum 0, Heating maximum 0; Setup: Cooling maximum Vcool-max, Minimum 0, Heating maximum 0; Warmup: Cooling maximum 0, Minimum 0, Heating maximum Vcool-max; Setback: Cooling maximum 0, Minimum 0, Heating maximum Vcool-max; Unoccupied: Cooling maximum 0, Minimum 0, Heating maximum 0.
